description.overview: An ancient German guardian breed, Hovawarts are faithful, even-tempered dogs. They're devoted to family and naturally protective.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, faithful, familial.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, slightly wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient German guardian breed, Hovawarts are faithful, even-tempered dogs. They're devoted to family and naturally protective.
